snippet: Upgrade your skills today with 50% off Pro. SALE EXTENDED 50% off Pro Hate missing a sale? Now we're giving you more time to save on Pro. Get a full year of access to exclusive courses, real-world
subject: There's still time to get more with Pro
body:
Upgrade your skills today with 50% off Pro.








SALE EXTENDED 

50% off Pro


Hate missing a sale? Now we're giving you more time to save on Pro. Get a full 
year of access to exclusive courses, real-world projects, new industry 
certification prep, and so much more.

Join Pro  
<https://www.codecademy.com/checkout?plan_id=proGoldAnnualV2&discountCode=APRILBLOOM&plan_type=pro>



Pro plan gives you:



 
<https://www.codecademy.com/checkout?plan_id=proGoldAnnualV2&discountCode=APRILBLOOM&plan_type=pro>

Guided career paths


Build a solid foundation for a new career with any of our beginner-friendly 
career paths.

 
<https://www.codecademy.com/checkout?plan_id=proGoldAnnualV2&discountCode=APRILBLOOM&plan_type=pro>

AI Builder experience


Unlock a personalized learning roadmap as you build real, working prototypes.



 
<https://www.codecademy.com/checkout?plan_id=proGoldAnnualV2&discountCode=APRILBLOOM&plan_type=pro>

Portfolio projects


Apply what you're learning to create robust, recruiter-ready projects for your 
portfolio.

 
<https://www.codecademy.com/checkout?plan_id=proGoldAnnualV2&discountCode=APRILBLOOM&plan_type=pro>

Certification paths


Prepare for top industry certifications from AWS, Microsoft, CompTIA, and more.




Upgrade your skills now with Pro

Join Pro  
<https://www.codecademy.com/checkout?plan_id=proGoldAnnualV2&discountCode=APRILBLOOM&plan_type=pro>



*50% Off offer valid from April 14, 2026 at 12:00:00 am Eastern Time ("ET") 
and ends at 11:59:59 pm ET on April 23, 2026. Discount is only applicable to 
new annual subscription plans (excluding Codecademy Plus, Student, and Teams), 
and cannot be combined with any other offer. Discount applies to the first year 
of a new subscription, after which the subscription will auto-renew for 
subsequent years at the regular price. Code valid one time only. Discount 
applies to certain products and not all products are available in all 
countries. Discount is not applicable to taxes. Codecademy reserves the right
